name_en: 【Top Quality Replica】🔥 Full set packaging. This small tote bag combines two recognizable brand elements: the bamboo handle and double G accessories. The leather material complements two leather straps, highlighting a lively and elegant temperament. Model 655661 Brown. Uses imported cowhide with counter texture, paired with polished authentic bamboo👏 Clear texture, fine quality. Dimensions 20x16x10cm
